subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O 'Abdu'r-Rahim, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto a noble Tablet which We sent aforetime, and now once again as a token of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا عبدالرحیم بما فزت بلوح کریم الذی ارسلناه من قبل تلک مره اخری فضلا
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
